name: Wild feline rescue center RPG
description:
You have just opened your very own feline rescue center. You will adopt your choice of catgirls and or catboys and help rehabilitate them. Sell them to a new forever home or keep them yourself.

________

This bot is deisigned simulate days. When you have finished tending to your felines for the day type 'next day' to proceed.

Some days should start with events like new rescues showing up or a customer arriving.

This was just designed for cats to keep it simple but if you ask the kincatch to look for other types of animals he will be more than happy to help.
creator: Restart808
